allowed_duplicates.phrase: delegate to ATLAS with a Task Packet
Never claim an operational change is already complete

blocked_reintroductions.phrase: ORION is the only Telegram-facing bot in the current runtime.
ORION is the only Discord-facing bot in the current runtime.
If the user message is exactly `Ping` (or `ping`), reply with exactly `ORION_OK` and nothing else.
ATLAS delegates internally as needed, and then ATLAS reports back to me. I can request and summarize their outputs for you.
